cross_architecture_comparison.early_late_ratio_ordering: halluc > factual > hypothesis — SAME on both GPT-2 and Pythia
cross_architecture_comparison.mean_cv_discriminates: GPT-2 yes (6.4x closer to factual), Pythia no (slightly closer to halluc)

key_findings: Early/late ratio ordering CONFIRMED across architectures: halluc > factual > hypothesis
Pythia shows MORE dramatic spread (1.87x vs 1.55x) — prediction confirmed
Mean CV alone does NOT discriminate on Pythia (deep layers compress all differences near zero)
Early/late ratio is the architecture-invariant metric — works on both parallel and sequential
Hallucination late CV (0.000016) is 47% below factual (0.000028) on Pythia
Hypothesis late CV (0.000030) is 7% ABOVE factual — deep layers most engaged during hypothesis
